violations.text: Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was removed from the floor at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The ceiling tile in the dry storage/freezer area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

Bowls are being used as in the prep unit. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

The cold water handle on the hand sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The wall behind the toasters is is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2023
